finding: An evaluation factory must propagate GoldenTask.domain into Plato; otherwise biology tasks silently exercise the default astronomy profile.
The evidence-matrix sidecar must persist Claim rows before EvidenceLink rows so unsupported-claim metrics retain their denominator, including claims with no source.
Golden expected_method_signals require an explicit methods.md recall metric; idea-keyword and source recall do not measure method adherence.
A temporal novelty candidate should require different pre-cutoff sources for its A-B and B-C edges, reject direct pre-cutoff A-C prior art, and retain abstention when bridge coverage is absent.

Whole-chain RMSD can be dominated by low-confidence flexible regions; structural triage should report whole-chain and confidence-masked core fits and keep discrepancy outputs labeled as unvalidated hypotheses.
Hash pseudo-embeddings are deterministic test fixtures, not scientific similarity features; offline novelty ranking should use an interpretable corpus-fitted baseline such as TF-IDF.
